whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, and to provide information to website owners.

items.name: Authentication (Supabase)
items.purpose: Keeps you signed in during your session. Without this cookie you would be logged out on every page.

items.name: Cookie consent (Iubenda)
items.purpose: Stores your cookie consent preferences so we do not show the banner on every visit.

items.name: Analytics
items.purpose: We do not currently use any third-party analytics cookies. If this changes we will update this policy and request fresh consent.

managing.title: Managing your preferences
managing.p1: You can review and change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the cookie settings link in the footer. You can also delete cookies through your browser settings — note that doing so may affect how the site works.
managing.p2Prefix: For more detail on how we handle your personal data, see our
